queries: within-head dim partition even-odd interleave parallel attention sub-group transformer 2025
comb-interleaved feature partitioning attention head split aliased spectrum LLM

raw_responses.title: Head-Group Parallelism (LoongTrain 2D-Attention + FairKV)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: heads partitioned into groups for parallel execution + KV-cache adaptive compression; head-group is closest 'sub-group' concept but is BETWEEN heads not WITHIN head dim.

raw_responses.title: Kimi Linear: Efficient Attention Architecture (2025)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: interleaves KDA with periodic full attention in 3:1 ratio; interleaving at LAYER level not at WITHIN-head dim level.

raw_responses.title: MatchFormer Interleaving Attention for Feature Matching (ACCV 2022)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: interleaves cross/self-attention BETWEEN layers; not within-head dim partitioning.

raw_responses.title: Multi-Head Attention Variants: MHA/MQA/GQA (2025)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: GQA groups Q-heads sharing K,V; reduces head count not dim partition.

raw_responses.title: TransMLA Multi-Head Latent Attention (2025)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: latent compression of multi-head; not dim-interleave.

raw_responses.title: SWAN Sliding Window Attention (EMNLP 2025)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: interleaves NoPE-global with SWA-RoPE-local at LAYER level.

raw_responses.title: U-shape Frequency-Band Aware Attention (2021)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: parallel time-axis + frequency-axis attentions; CONTIGUOUS-band split not comb-interleave.

raw_responses.title: FIT Far-reaching Interleaved Transformers
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: interleaves local + global transformer blocks.
